description_long: This object is a vintage-style electronic synthesizer keyboard, featuring a full set of piano keys and an angled control panel above the keys. The control panel is equipped with numerous rotary knobs, switches, and buttons, as well as a display screen and labeled sections for various sound parameters. The casing is primarily black with metallic and colored accents, giving it a robust and professional appearance. The keys are white and black, arranged in a standard piano layout, while the control panel includes orange, yellow, and red highlights for different controls. The rear of the device is solid and unadorned, with all functional elements concentrated on the front and top surfaces. This keyboard is designed for musical performance and sound synthesis, commonly found in studios, music venues, or urban street performances.
description: A vintage electronic synthesizer keyboard with a full piano key set and a control panel filled with knobs, switches, and a display, housed in a black and metallic case.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angled control panel and the depth of the keyboard, with visible keys and some control knobs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full set of piano keys and the detailed control panel with numerous knobs, switches, and a display screen.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the sloped control panel and the length of the keyboard, with keys and controls visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, solid back with no visible controls or keys.
